scene_title: Profetisa em confronto direto com camera
narrative_beat: Manto vermelho-sangue apontando para o espectador

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: colorful vivid prophetess in blood-red and ochre mantle standing firm with arm extended pointing at camera in direct accusation with serious determined expression and wind-swept hair in vibrant foreground
subject.focal_point: the prophetess's extended arm pointing directly at the camera — at us
subject.secondary: black and white desaturated modern tech corporation headquarters with dark logo on grey glass building in background
props: prophetess in blood-red and ochre mantle

mood.emotion: it is a present capability — the prophetess indicts now

symbolism.primary: the pointing finger aimed at the tech companies building the beast system
symbolism.secondary: wind-swept hair as prophetic urgency — no time left for comfort

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
muted desaturated background palette warm saturated foreground only

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
